'''wahuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readlength|readlength]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readlength|readlength]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wahuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæhihith|wæhihith]] || [[word:wæhihij|wæhihij]] || [[word:wæhihish|wæhihish]] || [[word:wæhihi|wæhihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wahuhuhuth|wahuhuhuth]] || [[word:wahuhuhuj|wahuhuhuj]] || [[word:wahuhuhush|wahuhuhush]] || [[word:wahuhuhu|wahuhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wahuhuth|wahuhuth]] || [[word:wahuhuj|wahuhuj]] || [[word:wahuhush|wahuhush]] || [[word:wahuhu|wahuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wahufhuth|wahufhuth]] || [[word:wahufhuj|wahufhuj]] || [[word:wahufhush|wahufhush]] || [[word:wahufhuf|wahufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wahuhuthu|wahuhuthu]] || [[word:wahuhuju|wahuhuju]] || [[word:wahuhushu|wahuhushu]] || [[word:wahuhuku|wahuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wahuhuth|wahuhuth]] || [[word:wahuhuj|wahuhuj]] || [[word:wahuhush|wahuhush]] || [[word:wahuhu|wahuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wahuhuthul|wahuhuthul]] || [[word:wahuhujul|wahuhujul]] || [[word:wahuhushul|wahuhushul]] || [[word:wahuhukul|wahuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wahuhuthuthu|wahuhuthuthu]] || [[word:wahuhujuju|wahuhujuju]] || [[word:wahuhushushu|wahuhushushu]] || [[word:wahuhuku|wahuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wahuhuthun|wahuhuthun]] || [[word:wahuhujun|wahuhujun]] || [[word:wahuhushun|wahuhushun]] || [[word:wahuhukun|wahuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wahuhuthuoro|wahuhuthuoro]] || [[word:wahuhujuoro|wahuhujuoro]] || [[word:wahuhushuoro|wahuhushuoro]] || [[word:wahuhukuoro|wahuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
